title: Research Associate I
description: Roche is seeking a Research Associate I to support our early-stage drug discovery programs in the Bethesda area. You'll contribute to cutting-edge pharmaceutical research, working alongside PhD-level scientists and contributing to projects that may transform patient outcomes. This is an excellent opportunity to launch a career in biopharmaceutical research.
responsibilities: Conduct laboratory experiments following established protocols and standard operating procedures
Maintain detailed laboratory notebooks and prepare research summaries for documentation
Perform data analysis and contribute to research publications and presentations
Manage laboratory supplies, equipment, and inventory; assist with equipment maintenance
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support project milestones

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Chemistry, Biology, Biochemistry, or related life sciences field
skills: Laboratory techniques in chemistry, cell biology, or molecular biology
Proficiency with laboratory information management systems
Strong scientific writing and technical communication
Attention to detail and commitment to data integrity
Ability to work independently and as part of a team

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Professional development and conference attendance support
Opportunities for career growth within research leadership
